message:
refactor(ufunc): share ellipsis resolver between einsum and einsum_optimized

Factored the PUA-placeholder expansion out of einsum into
resolve_einsum_ellipsis and routed einsum_optimized through it so
greedy/optimal contraction paths also accept '...ij,...jk,...kl->...il'
style subscripts. Previously einsum_optimized parsed '.' as literal
label characters which corrupted greedy cost estimates and produced
stray-dot errors. Added a three-operand ellipsis chain unit test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
